title: Dashboard choropleth maps and AI forecast
body:
* **Choropleth maps available**: Choropleth maps are now available for dashboards, allowing users to visualize data across geographical regions with varying colors based on values such as population, income, or other metrics. See [Choropleth map](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/types#choropleth).
* **AI Forecast on line charts**: You can now generate a forecast for a line chart ([Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types)). See  [Generate a forecast](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations#ai-forecast).
